meaning: vt.(在位置时间或程度方面)走在...之前,居先
examples: Many skiers are happy to forego a summer holiday to go skiing.
Or else he would forego his mortal nature.
Of course, that does not mean you should forego security!
Emmigrant has offered to forego accrued penalty interest in other cases, like the Saint-Jeans.
Expect litigation, settlements and agreements to forego receipt of such future payments by the insurance brokers.
